label: Recorded crime incidents
note:
Data may be subject to revision. Based on data extracted 01 March 2026.
From 07/11/2025 data for [b]'0412_13 Driving/In Charge of a Vehicle while Intoxicated – Alcohol and/or Drugs' [/b]- replaces[b] '0412 Driving/In Charge of a Vehicle While Over Legal Alcohol Limit' [/b]and[b] '0413 Driving/In Charge of a Vehicle Under the Influence of Drugs' [/b]from Q1 2025 onwards. These categories cannot currently be published separately due to a change in how An Garda Síochána record these crime incidents.[b]
..[/b] [b]Fraud, Deception & Related[/b] offences from Q3 2023 onwards has been revised due to the effect of the backlog in processing suspected fraud crime incidents reported to the Gardaí by Financial Institutions under Section 19 of the Criminal Justice Act, 2011. It is no longer comparable to those published for the period prior to Q3 2023. Please see [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/releasesandpublications/in/rc/march2025informationnoteonfraudcrimestatistics/]information note[/url] for further details. For revised figures from Q3 2023 please see PxStat tables [url=table/CJQ07]CJQ07[/url] & [url=table/CJQ08]CJQ08[/url].
The [b]’Under Reservation’ [/b]designation has been removed from Recorded Crime Statistics.
For further information please see our [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/methods/crime/liftingofunderreservationcategorisationforrecordedcrimestatisticsfaq/]Lifting of Under Reservation categorisation for Recorded Crime Statistics FAQ page [/url]on our website.
.. [b]Sexual offence Involving Mentally Impaired Person[/b] - due to low numbers, the number of incidents in this category are included in 'Other Sexual offences' from Q2 2023 and so year to year volumes and changes are not comparable to previous periods from this date.
For more information, please go to the [url=https://www.cso.ie/en/statistics/crimeandjustice/recordedcrime/]statistical release page[/url] on our website.
